documentation.file_docstring: Centralized relative-time formatting utilities. Consolidates 7+ scattered implementations (formatAge, formatAgeShort, formatAgo, formatRelativeTime, formatElapsedTime) into two functions: - `formatTimeAgo(durationMs)` — format a duration as "5m ago" / "5m" (for known elapsed time) - `formatRelativeTimestamp(epochMs)` — format an epoch timestamp relative to now (handles future)
inline_comments: Format a duration (in ms) as a human-readable relative time. Input: how many milliseconds ago something happened. With suffix (default):  "just now", "5m ago", "3h ago", "2d ago" Without suffix:         "0s", "5m", "3h", "2d"
Format an epoch timestamp relative to now. Handles both past ("5m ago") and future ("in 5m") timestamps. Optionally falls back to a short date for timestamps older than 7 days.
Fall back to short date display for old timestamps

functions.name: formatTimeAgo
functions.doc: Format a duration (in ms) as a human-readable relative time.     Input: how many milliseconds ago something happened.

functions.name: formatRelativeTimestamp
functions.doc: Format an epoch timestamp relative to now.     Handles both past ("5m ago") and future ("in 5m") timestamps.   Optionall
